title: Tricky Trails: Missing Blocks & Items
description: Minecraft mod that adds missing: walls, trapdoors, buttons, Stairs, of the tricky trails update! 1.21
body:
**Small description:**

This mod adds new blocks/items to your minecraft server. based on the minecraft update: 1.21 (trial chambers)
Minecraft has never released these blocks / items, so we'll just do it. 

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![trials and tails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90728ea9cb1f878e3444896e9211140cb384f90.png)
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfd0ee660f4edaca58c98414ece132ab7af869bc.png)

**Big description:**

Tricky Trails: Missing Blocks & Items fills in the gaps of your Minecraft experience by adding new blocks and items that should have always been there. Designed to enhance both aesthetics and gameplay, this mod introduces a variety of missing building blocks, functional items, and materials that expand your crafting possibilities and let you create more diverse and complex structures.

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with: intellij

#AD

**Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
